center.name: Tana River
center.summary: Tana River是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括鳞羽鸫鹛，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to the Jubba, Shebelle and Tana rivers and Kenyan shoreline

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is native to the Jubba, Shebelle and Tana rivers and Kenyan shoreline
